name: verify_check
description: Check a verification code submitted by the user against an active verification request. Pass the request_id from the verify_start response and the code the user provided. Returns a status indicating whether the code is valid. A successful check completes the verification flow. Codes expire after the configured timeout period.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: The unique verification request ID returned by verify_start. This is a path parameter in the URL.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The verification code entered by the user. Must match the code that was sent to the user's phone number.
